pattern: Accumulate the binary value in a single pass by left-shifting the running total one bit and OR-ing in each new node's value as you traverse from head to tail.
hints: The head holds the most significant bit, so each step you shift the accumulated result left by one and add the current node's value.
At any point the running total is the integer represented by the bits seen so far; simply extend it by one binary digit at each node.
Walk the list once: result = 0; for each node: result = (result << 1) | node.val; return result.

edge_inputs.description: all ones, 30 bits — maximum representable value
leading zeros do not inflate the value

stress.description: random binary strings of length up to 30
